category_sources: Official GitHub README says Ludusavi backs up PC video game save data and supports multiple game stores.
source_facts.description: Backup tool for PC game saves.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses the product name Ludusavi.
docs_sources: Official repository contains a docs/help tree and README Usage section with detailed help topics.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already set to https://github.com/mtkennerly/ludusavi; per instruction repo returned as null.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README lists backup/restore support for Steam, GOG, Epic, Heroic, Lutris, GUI and command-line interfaces, and cross-platform support.
